creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This PR was rather naive... perhaps I odidn't take linimon's comments 
about possibly complications quite seriously enough.  Hacking around in 
bsd.database.mk shows that it actually depends on being included later, 
so  not-so-subtle and hard to fix breakage will occur with this.  I'll 
have to come back if I ever fix this.
